name: analytics-sessions-detail-page
title: Sessions Detail
description: Agent-Native analytics route /sessions/:recordingId derived from sessions.$recordingId.tsx.

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Generated standalone page descriptor plus mounted React page route evidence from the authored workspace shell.
